Value: zero — free collected plastic decouples community COGS from Defy pricing

Under the joint downside the community co-op margin collapses to ~$14/bed while ACT debt is still serviced. Therefore the act_brokerage slider MUST FLEX DOWN in a downside (step to ~100/bed when margin/bed falls below a floor) or it crushes the community. This flex is the key CDFI/equity design point.
